action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 12 eval showed test BA 0.546, below best 0.602. Remaining time ~12 min, iterations 18. Cannot train new model. Analysis: Best score so far came from iter 3 CLIP+DANN (0.602). We have preserved epoch checkpoints up to 40, likely including the model from that run. Test-time augmentation (TTA) could boost rare-class recall and push score higher without training. Decision: Identify the best checkpoint from iter 3 logs (highest val BA), then create a predict.py that performs 10-crop TTA (5 crops + flips) to improve generalization, submit eval. This is our only viable strategy to exceed 0.602 within remaining time.
